File /local_disk0/.ephemeral_nfs/envs/pythonEnv-b1816427-a433-4759-848c-9142cb195914/lib/python3.12/site-packages/xgboost/sklearn.py:1761, in XGBClassifier.fit(self, X, y, sample_weight, base_margin, eval_set, verbose, xgb_model, sample_weight_eval_set, base_margin_eval_set, feature_weights)
   1756     expected_classes = self.classes_
   1757 if (
   1758     classes.shape != expected_classes.shape
   1759     or not (classes == expected_classes).all()
   1760 ):
-> 1761     raise ValueError(
   1762         f"Invalid classes inferred from unique values of `y`.  "
   1763         f"Expected: {expected_classes}, got {classes}"
   1764     )
   1766 params = self.get_xgb_params()
   1768 if callable(self.objective):
